entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Major staple food crop with high area and production in India

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, used as a primary measure of productivity

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A dimensionless quantity that characterizes plant canopies, used as a criterion for evaluating grain yield

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Technology used for crop growth monitoring and LAI estimation

entities.name: CROP SIMULATION MODELS
entities.description: Models used to assess the effects of different scenarios on crop yield

entities.name: DSSAT MODEL
entities.description: A specific crop simulation model used for predicting rice grain yield

entities.name: SENTINEL-2 SATELLITE
entities.description: Satellite used for the estimation of Leaf Area Index

entities.name: CEPTOMETER
entities.description: Instrument used for measuring Leaf Area Index in the field

entities.name: SUPERVISED CLASSIFICATION
entities.description: Image analysis technique performed using ERDAS Imagine

entities.name: ERDAS IMAGINE
entities.description: Software used for performing supervised classification of satellite imagery

entities.name: CROP CUTTING EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Field-based method for optimizing yield data collection

entities.name: NDVI
entities.description: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index used as a critical element for integration with crop models

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by living organisms that can lead to crop insurance losses

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by non-living factors that can lead to crop insurance losses

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shift in temperatures and weather patterns affecting crop yield

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A period of abnormally dry weather that affects crop yield

entities.name: KHARIF
entities.description: The autumn sowing season in India

entities.name: RABI
entities.description: The spring sowing season in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where rice is a major staple food

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: State in India contributing significantly to rice area and production

entities.name: KARIMNAGAR DISTRICT
entities.description: District in Telangana where the field-level research was conducted

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: CROP INSURANCE
entities.description: Insurance provided to farmers to cover losses due to stress and yield failure

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: Nutrient applied to crops that shows a strong correlation with grain yield
